expectations.text: AGENTS.md is placed at a path like internal/billing/AGENTS.md next to the code, NOT inside .specs/
expectations.evidence: File placed at outputs/AGENTS.md (root of outputs directory), not in internal/billing/ path.
Document is 172 lines — 3.4x over the 50-line maximum. Includes extensive code walkthroughs, data flow snapshots, and extension points.

expectations.text: Document does NOT restate function signatures, parameter lists, or type definitions from source code
expectations.evidence: Heavily restates code: User struct fields with line numbers (lines 30-35), Plan.PriceInCents location (38-40), Charger.ChargeSubscription steps (44-48), SubscriptionManager methods (50-53), StripeClient methods (55-60). Full Data/Control Flow Snapshots section (lines 123-145) is pure code-in-English.

expectations.text: Document mentions the immediate-cancellation-on-failure behavior as a gotcha
expectations.evidence: Gotcha #2: 'Immediate cancellation on any charge failure — No retry policy or grace period. Operationally aggressive; transient failures can cause churn.'

expectations.text: Document mentions that ChargeResult is consumed by external systems
expectations.evidence: ChargeResult mentioned as emitted (line 48: 'Emits ChargeResult on both success and failure') but its external consumers (analytics, fraud-detection, admin dashboard) are NOT identified.

expectations.text: User is asked about Cursor integration for .cursor/rules/*.mdc file generation
expectations.evidence: No Cursor question asked. No .cursor/rules file generated.
